Class DefaultSemanticCache.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.redis.cache.semantic.DefaultSemanticCache.Builder
Enclosing class:
DefaultSemanticCache
public static class DefaultSemanticCache.Builder extends Object
Builder for creating DefaultSemanticCache instances.
Author:
Brian Sam-Bodden, Soby Chacko, Yanming Zhou
